apiInfo.title: Synth
apiInfo.description: Synth API offers programmatic access to probabilistic price forecasts for Equities, Commodities and Cryptocurrencies.

endpoints.description: Get long and short liquidation probability estimates for an asset at various price levels. Returns the probability of liquidation within 6, 12, 18, and 24 hour windows for both long and short positions. Useful for assessing leverage risk, setting stop-loss levels, and managing margin exposure. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, JITOSOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL

parameters.name: horizon
parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 24h)

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: API key

endpoints.description: Get price interval analysis for an asset over the next 24 hours. Returns price intervals with the probability of price staying within each interval, expected time in-range, and estimated impermanent loss. Useful for concentrated liquidity positioning, options strike selection, and range-bound trading strategies. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, JITOSOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL

parameters.name: horizon
parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 24h)

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: API key

endpoints.description: Get the probability of an asset's price being above or below specific price targets over the next 24 hours. Returns probabilities for 11 upside and 11 downside price levels relative to the current price. Useful for options strike selection, Polymarket up/down contracts, and directional risk assessment. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, JITOSOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL

parameters.name: horizon
parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 24h)

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: API key

endpoints.description: Get SynthData-derived option prices for an asset. Returns theoretical call and put prices across a range of strike prices with expiry time, using SynthData's ensemble volatility forecasts. Compare against market-quoted premiums to identify mispriced options. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, SOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, SOL, JITOSOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL

parameters.name: horizon
parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 24h)

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: API key

endpoints.description: Get SynthData's estimated fair probabilities alongside live Polymarket odds for daily price range contracts. Returns both synth and Polymarket probabilities per range, current outcome, and order book data. Compare to identify mispriced range bets. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, SOL, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, SOL, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL

parameters.name: horizon
parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 24h)

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: API key

endpoints.description: Get SynthData's estimated fair probabilities alongside live Polymarket odds for daily Up/Down contracts. Returns both synth and Polymarket probabilities, current outcome, and order book data (best bid/ask). Compare to identify mispriced bets. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL

parameters.name: horizon
parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 24h)

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: API key

endpoints.description: Get SynthData's estimated fair probabilities alongside live Polymarket odds for hourly Up/Down contracts. Returns both synth and Polymarket probabilities, current outcome, and order book data (best bid/ask). Compare to identify mispriced bets on shorter timeframes. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, SOL.

parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, SOL

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: API key

endpoints.summary: Prediction Percentiles - meta model from top 10 miners
endpoints.description: Get price distribution percentiles for an asset over the 24-hour forecast horizon. Returns predicted prices at 9 percentile levels (0.5th, 5th, 20th, 35th, 50th, 65th, 80th, 95th, 99.5th), giving the full probability distribution of expected price movements. Useful for position sizing, setting price targets, and understanding tail risk. Supported assets: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, JITOSOL, SPY, NVDA, GOOGL, TSLA, AAPL

parameters.name: horizon
parameters.description: Forecast horizon: 1h for next-hour or 24h for next-day price intervals (default: 24h)

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to aggregate for the meta-leaderboard (default is 14). See 'Leaderboard - Latest Meta-Leaderboard'.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of miners from the meta-leaderboard to use for the analysis (default is 10)

endpoints.description: Get the current meta-leaderboard, which aggregates miners' incentives over a period of days. This provides another way to rank prediction accuracy, thereby increasing stability.

endpoints.description: Gets the latest prediction rates of the current best miner.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: the symbol of the asset: BTC, ETH, XAU, SOL, SPYX, NVDAX, TSLAX, AAPLX, GOOGLX

parameters.name: time_increment
parameters.description: the time interval (in seconds) of the validator prompt between each rate. 300 or 60.

parameters.name: time_length
parameters.description: the length of time (in seconds) of the validator prompt from the start time. 86400 or 3600.

parameters.description: API key
